description: Ron Zacapa 23 years is a magnificent rum, perhaps the best solera I know, but "straight from the cask".... oh man this is something else! The alcohol is more from the normal edition as I can see from the label. From the dottle you are suspicious about the content. I can see the signature of master blender, the bottle series number, also the trademark of zacapa straw bracelet is darker and has better quality from the ordinary. In the snifter glass I can see the darker color and the full body of the spirit, now my first impression that is something else from the ordinary is confirmed as I give some time to the spirit to bring all the aromas up. I can see in the nose melassa, walnut cream, dried fruits, I proceed in the mouth and I feel in my mouth the full body of the drink, honey, walnut cream, coffee, banana, cloves, in the end my tongue has vanilla ice cream.

description: The Ron Millonario XO might be the top rum in my collection. Paid $125 and had it shipped to Chicagoland from the UK. To my knowledge, I bought the last bottle. As good as it is, you really can't justify the price. I am a serious rum collector and the top rums (rated by yours truly) in my collection are listed below. Many are a fraction of the price and almost as good. In a blind tasting, any of them could win, including the cheapest one, the $20 a bottle five year old Plantation. No serious rum consumer would ever mix any of these rums with anything. If God drinks, he drinks these rums. If the public ever knew how good these rums really are, cognac sales would fall off the map. The aged rums are simply better. There are several hundred rums in my collection, but I am only listing the best of them below. I have attempted to list them by price. I don't drink much these days, but I sniff every bottle, every day. Mortals can only dream about pairing these rums with a limited edition Augusto Reyes cigar. They have some age now and they are wonderful. They are also available in the US. One of the few as good as the real Cubans. Enjoy the journey. Aged rum is nothing less than the history of America in a glass. A cognac glass no less. Like other mass-produced products, I don't like anything from Bacardi. I am also not a fan of Appleton or Mount Gay rums. If you want an excellent and low-cost rum for mixing, buy the Cruzan from St Croix for $11.

name: Diplomatico 2001
description: Diplomatico single vintage rums are one of my all time favorites. I drank the 2000, 2001, and 2002 side by side, and I really struggled to tell them apart. Has an amazing smell of rich butter toffee, caramel, and butterscotch, with a light sherry taste that isn't strong enough to detract from the rum. Taste is an amazing follow up to the nose. Strong at 43%abv, but so good the added strength is perfect. Another amazing rum from Diplomatico.

name: Abuelo Centuria
description: Only the most successful inspirations become legacies; legacies that are cherished and passed down from generation to generation. "Centuria" is our most guarded family treasure. It is the result of patience and passion for the details, embodied in our family's rum-making tradition since 1908. The taste of our legacy.

description: This 2002 version is smoother than the 2001 version. Climate conditions are certainly the reason. Notes of honey, caramel, vanilla, and exotic fruits. Super sweet, very long finish. It is closer to the vintage 2000. Another very good rum from Diplomatico.

description: Dos Maderas PX Luxus rum is produced using rums from Barbados and Guyana. The unique aging process includes an initial 10 years aging in the Caribbean in oak casks. This is followed by an additional 5 years of aging in Spain in casks used to age the sherry Don Guido.

A full-bodied rum with a long and smooth finish that lingers in the palate. Best enjoyed neat or on a rock, and paired with 70% cocoa chocolate.

description: El Dorado 21 is produced near the equator in Guyana by Demerara distillery. The final product is a blend of rums, aged between 21 and 25 years and crafted using 100% locally sourced Demerara sugar. Traditional tools are used in the distilling processes including three unique wooden stills. The rums rest until maturity in 45 gallon oak casks.

name: Black Tot Last Consignment British Royal Naval Rum
description: Black Tot Royal Navy Rum is a blended, aged rum that had been stored for 40 years in stone flagons by the British Royal Navy. The rum is part of the last rum ration served to British Royal Navy sailors on July 31, 1970 when the 300-year old tradition of a daily rum ration, or 'tot', ended. Until recently when 1000 bottles were made available for public sale, Black Tot Royal Navy rum was reserved only at British royal weddings and state functions.

description: Premium french aged agricole rum with floral and oak notes, nice nose, very smooth and subtil with a long afterburn. Beautiful balance with notes of fruit like apricot and a very light woody touch. The mouthfeel is light but flavorful, offering a complex taste that includes dried fruits and vanilla.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром The Wild Geese Golden 37,5%

name: Abuelo XV Napoleon Cognac Cask Finish
description: Looking beyond Panama for inspiration, Napoleon is expertly finished in Cognac casks from France for a deep explosion of ripe autumn fruit with elegant hints of oak and dark chocolate.

name: Mount Gay XO Triple Cask
description: The Mount Gay XO Triple Cask is the direct successor to the XO Old Reserva. It is aged and comes from Barbados, utilizing a combination of oak, American whisky, and cognac barrels for maturation. This rum showcases satisfying oak and sweet qualities, with notes of caramel and vanilla. It is known for its complexity and smoothness, making it suitable for sipping or cocktails.

name: Presidente 23-Year
description: Perfect balance between rich body and dim fresh fruity notes

name: El Dorado Special Reserve (pre 2020 bottle) 15-Year
description: El Dorado Special Reserve 15-Year rum is crafted from 15 to 25 year old rums that are then blended and married together in bourbon oak casks. Prior to blending, the original batches are distilled using 4 unique stills - the Enmore and Diamond Coffey stills, the Port Mourant double wooden pot still, and the Versailles single wooden pot still.

name: Hamilton Guyana 151
description: The best overproof rum out there.

name: Abuelo Oloroso Sherry Cask 15-Year
description: The Abuelo XV Oloroso is 15 years old and is first matured in American oak casks to be finished in Oloroso Sherry casks. The aroma is wonderful with sweet wood, sherry, vanilla, caramel, and pipe tobacco notes. It has a sweet and smooth taste with complex flavors that include dark fruits and spice, finishing sweet but without a harsh burn.

name: Clairin Sajous
description: A stunning product with rich flavors and aromas, providing a complex experience. Unaged and unfiltered, it exhibits a classic cane juice nose with hints of rubber, cotton, and citrus spices. Best enjoyed with a splash of water to reveal its spiced, fruity notes.

name: Mount Gay 1703 Old Cask
description: Mount Gay 1703 rum includes rums aged between 10 and 30 years that are joined by master distiller Allen Smith. Mount Gay Distilleries is the oldest operating distillery in the Americas - producing rum in Barbados since 1703, hence the rum's name. It's original name was Mount Gilboa, and in 1801 renamed Mount Gay after the distillery's manager Sir John Gay Alleyne.

name: Pusser's British Navy 15-Year
description: This is a great rum that from now on will have a place in my rumbar. I would say if you like the other rum in Pusser’s range you will also like this one. The same goes for if you like the El Dorado 12 or/and 15, but think they are a little too sweet. If you compare it with the old 15yo, Nelson’s Blood, it’s not nearly as sweet and there’s a lot more Port Mourant rum in it and besides that, are also the rest of the rum from DDL. From the aroma in nose to the medium long finish it’s possible to recognize fruits, caramel, hints of tobacco, vanilla, licorice, pepper and besides this of course Demerara sugar. Overall it’s a very good rum, probably quite long from what a navy rum tasted way back in time. If you want to taste something more like that you have to go to the Gunpowder Proof, I suppose.

name: Kirk and Sweeney 18-Year
description: Kirk and Sweeney 18-Year is made from the finest, hand-harvested fresh sugarcane and aged in American oak barrels for a minimum of 18 years.

name: A.D. Rattray 9 Year Old (2003) Barbados Rum – Four Square Distillery (Cask 15)
Papas Pilar 24 Spanish Sherry Cask Finished
description: A tribute to Ernest Hemingway. A blend of Virgin Islands rums, where the oldest component is 24 years old, at 43% strength in bottle. The rum was aged in several types of cask: bourbon, port and sherry Oloroso wine.

name: Ron Zacapa 2014 Reserva Limitada
description: Zacapa's finest, nice and rich nose, the aromatic sweet herbs make their presence felt a second after you sip from it, very well-balanced taste, masks the strength 45% quite nicely.

name: Pusser's British Navy ”Nelson’s Blood” 15-Year
description: Pusser’s British Navy Rum 15-Year is a blend of five rums from Jamaica, Guyana, Trinidad and Barbados which are produced in mainly wooden pot stills. The blend is aged for 15 years. The company derives its name from the British Navy 'Purser' who distributed a daily 'tot' of rum ration to each sailor - a tradition which lasted from 1655 until 1970. In 1979 Charles Tobias obtained the rights to blend the original recipe of the British Navy Rum. Pusser's British Navy Rum is casually known as “Nelson’s Blood” as a nod to the famous death of Admiral Nelson. After being mortally wounded in a naval battle in 1805, Nelson’s body was preserved in a barrel of rum.

name: Lemon Hart 151
description: The venerable Lemon Hart 151. Unmistakable in cocktails. Deep caramel and Demerara sugar. Explodes with molasses and oak. Rich chocolate chip cookie dough.

name: Havana Club 15-Year
description: Havana Club 15-Year is a rich rum aged for 15 years in oak barrels, offering deep flavor notes with hints of caramel, wood, and spices.

name: Abuelo XII Two Oaks
description: Abuelo Two Oaks is a sublimely smooth 12 year old rum double-matured in two distinctive oak barrels. First, it is matured in selected oak bourbon casks, then it is finished in extra-charred virgin American oak.

name: Botucal Reserva Exclusiva
description: Botucal Reserva Exclusiva is an Aged rum from Venezuela with a smooth and aromatic profile, often described as delicate with sweet chocolate notes. The rum is generally well-received and considered recommendable to most consumers.

name: Doorly's ABV43 12-Year
description: Doorly's ABV43 12-Year is an outstanding rum with a slight sweetness, butteriness, and mild oak presence. It is smooth and complex with hints of vanilla and a finish balanced between molasses from the cane and tannins from the oak.

name: Brugal Siglo de Oro
description: Brugal Siglo De Oro comes in a nice fancy blue box with a magnet on the front of it. The bottle itself is a very fancy style shape with a big fancy cork and gold seal on the front. It has a pleasant fruit kind of taste to it with hints of spices. It is by no means a $130 bottle of rum. I've had $40.00 bottles of rum that tasted better. Brugal Leyenda is a far better tasting rum and so is the El Dorado 12 year old rum IMHO.

name: Appleton Estate Limited Edition 30 Year Old Rum
Appleton Estate Black River Casks 15-Year
description: Appleton 15 YO is a blend of pot and column stills rums that have been aged in a tropical climate for a minimum of 15 years. It has a slightly estery blend of various kinds of fruits and woods with a very sweet, fruity, fragrant scent. The taste is dry and smooth with a slight burn and has minimal sweetness compared to the aroma.

name: Santiago de Cuba Anejo Superior 11-Year
description: This is a column distilled Cuban rum from one of the oldest Distilleries in Cuba, aged 11 years in white oak casks. This rum is regarded in some circles as the Pride of Cuba and was the favorite of Fidel Castro. Unfortunately, it is less known abroad - probably due to it originating outside of Havana, in Santiago de Cuba. This rum is produced from sugar cane grown in the Southeast part of Cuba. It is then boiled down to molasses and distilled on a column still. After distillation the rum is is the charcoal filtered before being aged 11 years in used white oak casks in Cuba. It is then bottled at 40% ABV.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Santiago de Cuba Anejo Superior 11 років в коробці

name: Cubaney Exquisito 21-Year
description: Neutral Rum with medium to long aftertaste. Produced by Oliver & Oliver gives you quality. Sweet and smooth on the level which is not annoying.

name: Blackwell 007 Limited Edition
description: The special limited edition Blackwell 007 was created to celebrate the 25th James Bond film "No Time To Die". The filming of the new Bond movie took place in Jamaica and Blackwell 007 is the chosen drink of the new James Bond. It is a 2-4 year old rum that is aged in Jamaica in American oak barrels and bottled at 40% ABV.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Blackwell Fine Jamaican 007 Limited Edition

name: HSE XO Grande Reserve 8-Year
description: The H.S.E. (Habitation Saint Etienne) Extra View XO is an Agricole Blend from Martinique. The used distillates that were stored in oak barrels between 10 - 50 years. It is bottled with 43% drinking strength. The Agricole Rhum, of course, has no additives. The dark rhum comes in a simple but very high-quality bottle. The cork really stuck hard. In the glass, the Rhum makes an absolutely high-quality impression. He walks heavy along the glass and pulls beautiful streaks. Light and fresh, it reproduces fruity notes. Grassy with sweet mocca note and some spice come through. Over time he evolves more wood notes. Also some nut and smoke resonate. Simply great and multi-layered. On the palate, the Rhum is very intense. Dry, strong oak, tobacco and smoke notes unfold. This is where Bourbon Feeling comes in. It is captured by a very pleasant light floral sweetness. Vanilla and seasoning such as nutmeg and pepper are included. Absolutely full-bodied, the finish comes with a slight warm sharpness and leaves a pleasant barrel note in the mouth. Smoke and wood with a slight vanilla aroma persist for a long time. Absolutely awesome. Simply delicious.

name: A. H. Riise Non Plus Ultra Very Rare
description: A. H. Riise Non Plus Ultra Very Rare is an aged rum from Denmark. It is known for its sweetness and rich flavors including caramel, vanilla, and dried fruits. Users have noted that it has a long aftertaste with various sweet notes, making it a favorite for those who enjoy sweeter rums.

name: Pere Labat Blanc 59
description: Alcoholic seawater in a steel tank

name: Quorhum 23-Year
description: This rum is one of my absolute favorites, rich in its bouquet, full with caramel, nuts and sugarcane. The taste is also heavy with caramel and sweetness, with a pleasant peat. A little sharp alcohol sting, but slowly sipping this one in your favorite couch on a Friday night is pure heaven.

name: Vizcaya VXOP 21
description: Vizcaya VXOP rum is produced from sugar cane that is distilled in small batches then aged for between 18 and 21 years in bourbon casks.

name: Veritas White
description: Delightful for sipping or mixing, this rum is a blend of rums from Hampden in Jamaica and Foursquare in Barbados. It is known for its fruity palate and aromatic profile, making it ideal for cocktails like the Daquiri.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Foursquare Veritas White

name: Origenes Don Pancho Reserva Especial 18-Year
description: Origenes Don Pancho Reserva Especial 18-Year is a well-balanced rum with aromas of butterscotch, vanilla, and allspice. It's known for its smoothness and pleasant flavor, making it a staple on many bars.

name: Appleton Estate Rare Casks 12-Year
description: Appleton Estate Rare Casks 12-Year is a well-regarded rum known for its smoothness and complex flavors with banana and oak notes. It has received positive reviews for being suitable for sipping and cocktails.

name: Millonario Reserva Especial 15
description: Ron Millonario Reserva Especial 15 rum is created from molasses using a 1930's Scottish column still and aged in American and Slavonian oak casks up to 15 years using the solera blending method.
process: Aged in American and Slavonian oak casks using the solera blending method

name: Mount Gay XO Extra Old
description: Mount Gay Extra Old (often written "OX") is a blend of rums aged between 8 and 15 years in American bourbon barrels. Mount Gay Distilleries is the oldest operating distillery in the Americas - producing rum in Barbados since 1703.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Mount Gay Extra old в коробці

name: Admiral Rodney Extra Old 12-Year
description: Admiral Rodney Extra Old rum is produced in St. Lucia using a continuous still, and then aged in American oak casks for an average of 12 years.

name: Напій на основі рому Captain Morgan Tiki Mango & Pineapple

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Напій на основі рому Captain Morgan Tiki Mango & Pineapple

name: Ром Santisima Trinidad de Cuba 3 роки

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Santisima Trinidad de Cuba 3 роки

name: Ron Zacapa Etiqueta Negra
description: Ron Zacapa Etiqueta Negra is a smooth rum with more wood and less sweetness compared to the traditional Zacapa 23.

name: Barcelo Imperial Premium Blend 30 Aniversario
description: A special rum for my 300th. This rum has a rich mahogany turning to an amber on the edges. Swirling the rum in my snifter reveals excellent legs. The aroma is fantastic. It's flavor is complex with oakiness from tannins and tastes of vanilla, toffee, spicy pepper, black cherry, and a slight wine flavor. It has a bit of a bite due to the 43% ABV (86 proof) but the burn fades quickly leaving a finish of oak tannins as well as vanilla & toffee. An awesome rum appreciated by both bourbon enthusiasts and hardcore rum aficionados. Each bottle is hand-numbered.

name: Facundo Eximo
description: Great rum to sip or be enjoyed on the rocks! Beautiful color, very smooth vanilla notes and warm finish!

name: Kaniche Perfeccion
description: Kaniche Perfeccion is an aged rum featuring a blend of tropical fruit, christmas spice, and coconut on the nose, with flavors of coconut, orange zest, and olive brine on the palate. It has a smooth finish with hints of mango, baking spice, and campfire smoke.

name: Hampden Estate 8-Year
description: Funky, dry and delicious

name: Plantation 2004 Peru
description: Plantation 2004 Peru

name: Dos Maderas Seleccion
description: Pleasant variation from the Dos Maderas rum family.

name: Gosling's Family Reserve Old
description: Gosling's Family Reserve Old rum is crafted in Bermuda from the same blend as Gosling Black Seal but is aged longer in dark barrels. Each bottle is hand-labelled and numbered.

name: Bacardi Reserva Limitada
description: Bacardi Reserva Limitada is a remarkable sipping rum, offering mild flavors and a unique quality compared to other rums. The nose is sweet with hints of oak, molasses, and banana, leading to a smooth mouthfeel with flavors of molasses and mild spices.

name: Caroni 12-Year
description: Boom! Explosion of flavour with its 50%, 100proof profile. A heavy rum that is oily, smoky, and full of fruity notes. It has been described as having a very dry profile, with a long oaked finish and little sweetness. A rum that stands out with complex flavors and is not for beginners.

name: RL Seale ABV 43 10-Year
description: RL Seales 10 Year is a premium rum produced and bottled in Barbados by Foursquare Distillery. It is aged in oak barrels for a minimum of ten years prior to blending.

name: Presidente 15-Year
description: Straight Rum with a decent sweetness. Flavours of vanilla, cocoa, and coffee. Creamy aftertaste with a little bit of cedar and oak.

name: Rum Fire White Overproof
description: This is an unaged molasses-based pot still distilled rum from Hampden’s high ester marque HLCF with an ester count of 500-600 g/hlAA. It’s wildly intense aromas and flavors come from the esters produced by Hampden’s muck pits and the bacterial overgrowths in the fermentation tanks. Short Description: Intense, raw tropical fruit mashup soaked in Everclear and topped with raw sugar. Alternatively, it could be described as a wildly fruity gin and tonic at 63% ABV.

name: Kaniche XO
description: Kaniche XO rum is produced in Barbados where it is first aged in bourbon casks. It is one of the few rums that is then double aged for a more mellow finished in Pierre Ferrand ex cognac casks at their location in France.

name: Neisson Blanc 50
description: Very floral rum in taste and aroma. Hints of limes. It would be excellent for Ti punch

name: Barbancourt Estate Reserve 15-Year
description: A true pure Agricole Rhum slow-aged for 15 years in French Limousin Oak Casks. This rum is unadulterated and designed for sipping slowly, presenting notes of Vanilla, Sherried Oranges, Brown Figs, and a peppery oak finish.

name: Oliver's Exquisito 1995 Solera
description: Sweet, fruity and rounded rum with a chocolate and toffee aroma.

name: Quorhum 15-Year
description: Unknown

name: Equiano Original 8-Year
description: Equiano consists of rums from Gray's distillery in Mauritius (10-Year rum aged in ex-Cognac French oak casks) and Foursquare Distillery in Barbados (8-Year rum aged in ex-Bourbon American white oak casks), which are blended at Foursquare Distillery. Equiano is exclusively blended and bottled at Foursquare in Barbados.

name: Denizen Merchants Reserve 8-Year
description: A very special rum for a very special cocktail. The bouquet is intensely aromatic and floral. The taste is dry. Sugar-loading has not smoothed out this 8-year-old's rough edges; from start to finish, this is a rum with character. It's not the most refined sipper, but it's still quite sippable. Try it in a Daiquiri or swap it into your favorite classic tiki drinks that call for Martinique, Jamaican, or 'gold' rum.

name: El Dorado (pre 2020 bottle) 12-Year
description: El Dorado 12-Year Rum is composed of a blend of aged rums, all at least 12 years old. The rums are distilled using a combination of stills including coffey stills and a double wooden pot still before being aged in bourbon oak casks.

name: Real McCoy Single Blended 12-Year
description: Real McCoy 12 Year is a blend of pot and column still rums made from molasses and aged in ex-bourbon barrels for a minimum of 12 years. The rich, woody aroma gives a good preview of what this rum tastes like. There are prominent notes of oak and smoke on the palate, then a pleasant browned butter caramel flavor throughout the finish. This would be an excellent transitional rum for a bourbon drinker.

name: Worthy Park Single Estate Reserve 6-10 Years
description: The Worthy Park Single Estate Reserva is a molasses blend from Jamaica. Single estate means that everything around the 6-10 years old rum stored in bourbon oak barrels is done in-house. Without additives or dyes, the rum is bottled with very pleasant 45% alcohol. The ester content is not specified. Worthy Park is super fruity in the nose and typical Jamaica very strong and intense. It is also adhesive perceptible. Banana, pineapple and more. Wood and sweet notes also resonate. But the slightly dirty fruit notes dominate. Complex enough to have fun with nosing for a long time. On the palate, the fruity note comes to you immediately. Banana is dominant. But it is also sweet with vanilla and some honey. On the palate, the ester is rather mild. Tobacco is a little recognizable. The finish is woody with oak and here too the fruitiness remains. The sharpness is pleasant and binds everything very nicely. Worthy Park is super pleasant to drink and complex without being overwhelming.

name: Papas Pilar Dark 24-Year
description: A sweet maple syrup aroma with medium alcohol scent. First sip gives a bit of an alcohol kick, which transitions to pepper, followed by a very distinct maple flavor. The alcohol bite covers some of the heavy sweetness.

name: Autentico Nativo 15-Year
description: A very smooth Panama rum. Dark almost burnt caramel/sugar, some coffee, vanilla, wood, and a touch of chocolate.

name: Smith and Cross Traditional Jamaica Navy Strength
description: Smith and Cross Traditional Jamaica Navy Strength is a bold, pot-stilled rum known for its high ABV and complex flavors. With a potency of 57%, it offers an explosion of spice and tropical fruit notes, perfect for mixing in cocktails or sipping for the adventurous palate.

name: Malteco 20-Year
description: A sweet vanilla rum that is a chocolate bomb with notes of raisins, caramel, and chocolate. Medium light body with hints of wood and pepper.

name: Dos Maderas PX 5+5
description: Dos Maderas PX 5 + 5 rum is made from a combination of rums from Barbados and Guyana. It is unique because of its triple aging process where for 5 initial years the rum is aged in the Caribbean in oak casks. Next, PX 5 + 5 is aged in Spain for 5 years in sherry casks, and lastly for 2 more years in even older sherry casks.

name: Plantation Overproof O.F.T.D.
description: Plantation Overproof O.F.T.D. is a dark rum that boasts an excellent flavor profile with deep, deep toffee amber color. It has an initial sweetness of marked molasses and a surprising smoothness, even at 69% ABV. The rum features aroma hints of brown sugar and oak, and flavors including burnt brown sugar, caramel, and some spice.

name: Angostura 1824 12-Year
description: Angostura 1824 rum is a blend of rums aged for at least 12 years in oak barrels. The aged rums are blended, re-casked, and upon maturity hand-drawn for bottling.

name: A. H. Riise XO Reserve Anniversary 175-Year
description: A sweet and smooth rum with a delightful taste reminiscent of fruit and candies.

name: Santa Teresa 1796
description: Santa Teresa 1796 rum is produced in Venezuela and aged using the solera system that blends rums aged between 4 and 35 years. Before bottling, the rum is aged for a further year in large French oak casks to marry the blends.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Santa Teresa 1796 у тубусі

name: Напій на основі рому La Cruz Spiced

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Напій на основі рому La Cruz Spiced

name: Barbancourt Reserve du Domaine 15-Year
description: Aged for 15 years, this rum provides complexity, smoothness, and earthy characteristics usually associated with agricole rhum due to being distilled from pressed/squeezed fresh cane juice.

name: Roble Ultra Anejo 12-Year
description: Ultra Añejo 12-Year is characterized by an intense flavor, with notable vanilla notes and a rich aftertaste. It is described as similar to Santa Teresa 1892 but more intense and not as dry.

name: Relicario Dominicano Supremo
description: Ron Relicario Supremo contains a blend of rums aged between 10 and 15 years.

name: La Hechicera Extra Anejo
description: La Hechicera Extra Anejo rum Is distilled using the solera method and aged between 12 and 21 years in American white oak casks.

name: Arehucas Anejo Reserva Especial 18-Year
description: Elegant, mahogany-colored with a powerful nature. Dense and intense aroma of sugar cane, spices, caramel and vanilla. The rum matured in oak barrels for 18 years, in the cellar vaults of Arehucas on the Canary Islands.

name: English Harbour 10-Year
description: Rums under the English Harbour label are produced from fermented molasses via copper pot distillation. Maturation takes place in small 220 litre x-whisky and bourbon barrels. This 'Reserve' bottling has been aged for a minimum of 10 years, with components up to 25 years of age included in the final blend.

name: Ron Zacapa Edicion Negra
description: A dark sipping rum with a taste profile containing caramel, oak, and vanilla flavors associated with the Zacapa line. The Edicion Negra includes smoke from the charred barrels, along with traces of leather, tobacco, and spice.

name: Brinley Gold Shipwreck Spiced 4-Year
description: Brinley Gold Shipwreck Spiced 4-Year rum is known for its genuine spices and flavors. It offers a rich, thick mouthfeel and is versatile enough for sipping neat or mixing in cocktails.

name: Punta Cana Esplendido 12-Year
description: This Rum coming from house Olivers & Olivers is worth the 40 Euros price and is better then other more expensive rums. I really recommend this one!

name: Matusalem Gran Reserva 18-Year
description: Matusalem Gran Reserva Rum is produced using a combination of rums aged on average 15 years and distilled from molasses using the solera process.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Matusalem Gran Reserva 15
Ром Havana Club Anejo 3 роки

name: Big Black Dick Dark Caribbean Rum
Barcelo Imperial Onyx
description: Barcelo Imperial Onyx is a rum from the Dominican Republic, known for its filtration through onyx stones and aging in three different bourbon barrels, providing a unique flavor profile.

name: Ron Zacapa 23 Solera
description: Ron Zacapa 23 Solera Rum was created in 1976 in the highlands of Guatemala, where it is distilled in a copper-lined column still from fresh cane juice before solera aging. The 500 year-old Spanish Sistema Solera method is used to age Ron Zacapa 23 in white oak casks. This results in a combination of rums aged between 6 and 23 years.

name: Abuelo Gran Reserva 12-Year
description: A refined and elegant rum, inspired by true character. After 12 years of aging in selected barrels, it boasts luxurious and exceptional. Its well-rounded flavours are only achieved by time and artistry. Drink it by itself, paired with dark chocolate or along with mature tobacco cigars. Character behind every sip.

name: Dictador Solera Distillery Icon Reserve 20-Year
description: Dictador iconic product. Dictador 20 Years Old is aged in American Oak ex-Bourbon barrels, then finished in ex-Port casks. Your rum for the special occasion. Taste it neat!

name: A. H. Riise Family Reserve Solera 1838
description: This rum smells and tastes like an apricot marmalade. For me it's too sweet and fruity and you can't almost recognize that you are drinking a rum.

name: Appleton Estate Rare Blend 12-Year
description: Another rum I will claim is essential to any serious rum-lover's bar. It is heavy, with much complexity and funk. Unique and engaging on its own, and pure magic when mixed.

name: Hamilton Jamaican Pot Still Black
description: Hamilton Jamaican Pot Still Black is a heavy hogo rum that is dyed caramel. The funk is typical of other Jamaican high-ester styles: rotting banana on the front and dark chocolate on the end. This one, however, is particularly funky on the nose and palate. However, I expected more from the finish, which tastes rather flat for my taste. Still an excellent hogo from Ed Hamilton worth trying neat at least once. I've heard it shines in a jungle bird, though I have yet to make one myself.

name: Angostura 1787 15-Year
description: Angostura 1787 15-Year rum offers a sweetness with full notes of butterscotch, baked banana, and vanilla, balanced by deep, tarry, and oaky petroleum notes.

name: Doorly's 8-Year
description: Admittedly, I am a person with a champagne taste with a beer budget. I am always searching for the best rum that I can both enjoy on the rocks while keeping my finances in check. Recently, while at the local “adult beverage” store, I was met with a vast selection of rums. I opened my RumRatings app and read the Doorly’s 8 reviews. I am glad I did! This is one of the finest rums, at this price point, that I have ever tasted. The taste is bold and mature for an 8 year old vintage. There is no reason to go to a spiced rum for boldness when one can enjoy a few sips of this rum. Thanks to all for their thoughtful comments on Doorly’s 8, you have gained a friend. Solute!

name: Bacoo 12-Year
description: Bacoo 12-Year is a mysterious new rum from the Dominican Republic. It features a blend of vanilla, caramel, oak, and traces of spice from aging in bourbon barrels. The initial taste reveals molasses and oak with a slightly sweet yet not sticky finish.

name: Siesta Key Toasted Coconut
description: Siesta Key Toasted Coconut rum, a version of their Silver Rum that’s infused with real toasted coconut and natural spices. Honey is added before it’s bottled at 70 proof.

name: Brugal 1888
description: Brugal 1888 is 'double aged', first aged up to 8 years in American oak barrels followed by Spanish oak sherry casks for up to 6 years.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Brugal Gran Reserva 1888

name: Austrian Empire Reserva 1863
description: Aged rum with a fruity aroma and a sweet, balanced taste. Noted for vanilla, honey, and overripe fruit flavors.

name: Don Q Gran Anejo
description: A fabulous premium rum if you have the scratch. It comes in a wonderful box that looks like a silk coffin. I love sipping it on special occasions. The best I've had from Don Q.

name: Gold of Mauritius Solera 5-Year
description: Gold of Mauritius Solera 5-Year is a rum that is known for its round shape at the bottom and square top. It presents dark tones that shift to deep red when in the glass, offering aromas of hazelnut and a mild mouthfeel with a light oak barrel aftertaste. Despite its 5 years of aging, it strikes a balance between flavor and smoothness, although some find it lacking in depth compared to more matured rums.

name: Probitas White
description: This is supposed to be a stellar mixing rum, but damn is pretty good for sipping. Very creamy feeling and you can taste some funkiness. Nose: ripe banana. Taste: Ripe tropical fruits, very creamy, and sweet in a good way. The aftertaste is even better, the fruit flavor dominates your palate for a long time.

name: Depaz VSOP 7-Year
description: Aged for 7 years, bottled at 45%vol, with a nice lightly golden amber hue. It has a delicate fruity, grassy mix of sweet pineapple, peach, pear, vanilla and light caramel with a dry sprinkle of oak, nutmeg and pepper. The medium bodied taste carries a lot of the notes from the aroma, intense, full of flavor and finishes with tobacco notes and woody tannins.

name: Напій на онові рому Cucaracha Spiced Gold

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Напій на онові рому Cucaracha Spiced Gold
Ром Cortez Blanco

name: Clement Cuvee Homere 6-Year
description: Comes of refined with vinous, floral oaky notes and a hint of sugarcane in the nose. In the mouth it starts off fairly sweet for an Agricole. Spicy notes of oak, white pepper and a bit of dark chocolate emerges after the initial sweetness, but it stays well rounded with a lingering finish. Quality rhum, that doesn't take any adventurous risks to really set it aside in the price bracket. But when in the mood for uncomplicated quality rhum, this fits the bill very well.

name: Flor de Caña 18-Year
description: A sugar-free 18-year old, ultra premium rum that is sustainably produced (Carbon Neutral & Fair Trade certified). From a 5th generation family estate, it is naturally aged without artificial ingredients, distilled 100% with renewable energy and KOSHER certified. A full-bodied rum with a long and smooth finish that lingers in the palate. Best enjoyed neat or on a rock, with a peel of orange.

name: Opthimus 18-Year
description: Der in Bourbon-Whisky-Fässern gereifte OPTHIMUS 18 spendiert dem geneigten Rum-Liebhaber eine regelrechte Geschmacksvielfalt, bei der Noten aus Toffee, Vanille, Schokolade, Holz und Karamell perfekt ausbalanciert sind.

name: Rumbullion Spiced
description: A spiced rum that offers a wonderful nose of clove and orange zest, with flavors of orange, clove, caramel, and various spices. It's known for a good sweet and spicy finish, effective both neat and in cocktails.

name: Clement Creole Shrubb Liqueur D’Orange
description: A truly superior orange liqueur that is best as a component in more sophisticated cocktails, using an agricole base instead of neutral spirits, offering grassy notes with additional spices.

name: Ron Esclavo 15-Year
description: Ron Esclavo 15-Year is a product that promises a rich experience, catering to those who appreciate the nuances of aged rums. While it has received commendations for its smoothness and complexity, some enthusiasts feel it could be better compared to the more luxurious XO variant.

name: Hamilton 86 Demerara
description: Great rum from Guyana. An impressive original, unaltered Demerara.

name: Companero Panama Extra Añejo 12-Year
description: This rum presents a bright honey-yellow amber with gold reflections. It delivers a nose of tropical fruits, oranges, bananas, and oak, complimented by a thick layer of cocoa powder. The palate is initially shocked by the 54% ABV, but quickly awakens to flavors of burnt caramel, citrus, and an abundance of cocoa. In the finish, there are lingering notes of citrus and more cocoa, making it an enjoyable experience for both beginners and connoisseurs.

name: HSE VSOP Reserve Speciale 4-Year
description: HSE Réserve Spéciale VSOP is just 4-years old and is aged in bourbon oak barrels. The nose is warm, rich, sweet, spicy, fruity and woody with an aroma of vanilla. At the palate, the aroma from the nose is persistent with the woodyness dominating. The finish is long with everything persistent with the woodyness and dryness dominating.

name: A. H. Riise 1888 Copenhagen Gold Medal
description: A wonderfully sweet and fruity rum. Typical A.H. Riise. Also very light on the finish. Really pleasant to drink. Currently my wife's favorite rum. For me, it is almost too sweet.

name: Diplomatico Distillery Collection No1 Batch Kettle
description: Diplomaticos from 2000-2002 are gone, so I tried this new special one. At first it hits you with a lot of alcohol in the nose, but also sweetness and various aromas. If you let it breathe for a few minutes, you discover a very neat rum.

name: Ron Del Barrilito 3 Star
description: Ron del Barrilito 3 Star rum is produced in Bayamón Puerto Rico by the Fernández family, which has been producing rum in the area since 1804, making it the oldest rum manufacturer in Puerto Rico. The rum is first blended and then aged for a minimum of 6 years.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Ron del Barrilito Two Stars

name: A. H. Riise Navy Strength 55%
description: A. H. Riise Navy Strength 55% is known for its strong flavor profile and high alcohol content. It has been praised for its spiced aroma and sweet undertones.

name: Rhum JM XO 6-Year
description: Rhum JM XO is an elegant rhum that suits any palate. It has a fresh sugarcane note mixed with wood and ash, and its flavour includes toasted nut, lemon & sage, mango, passion fruit, and a finish of spices like white pepper, cinnamon, and nutmeg. The palate is mid-bodied with a long-lasting, sweet finish. Aged 100% in re-charred Bourbon barrels.

name: Mount Gay Black Barrel Double Cask 7-Year
description: Mount Gay Black Barrel Double Cask 7-Year has a smoky aroma, good development of flavor qualities after a week or two after opening the bottle, and is considered a memorable rum considering its young age.

name: Diplomatico Distillery Collection No2 Barbet
description: Diplomatico Distillery Collection No2 Barbet

name: The Scarlet Ibis Gold
description: The Scarlet Ibis rum was initially produced for exclusive use by the Death & Co bar in New York, and now available in available to the public in limited quantities as supplies last. This rum is a blend of pot-still rums from Trinidad that were aged 3-5 years in white oak casks. The name is derived from the bright pink Scarlet Ibis bird, which is native to the Caribbean and adorns the bottle.

name: Chairman’s Reserve Legacy 5-8 Years
description: A special-edition rum from Chairman's Reserve, Legacy celebrates the distillery's founder Laurie Bernard and honours his method of blending spirits from different types of stills and casks.

name: Clement Canne Bleue
description: This is without a doubt my favorite white agricole. Love to use it as a sipper, but it is also really effective to improve any cocktail that calls for agricole.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Clement Canne Bleue Martinique 50%

name: Matusalem Gran Reserva 23-Year
description: Matusalem Gran Reserva 23-year rum is the premium version of the Matusalem company's rum, aged an average of 23 years and distilled from molasses using the traditional solera process.

name: Blue Mauritius Gold
description:
Company: Blue Mauritius
Name: Gold
Type: Gold
Country: Mauritius

name: Chairman’s Reserve Spiced
description: Chairman’s Reserve Spiced

name: Zaya Gran Reserva 12-Year
description: Zaya Gran Reserva Rum is a blend of molasses-based rums distilled in a five-column still and aged in white oak barrels for up to 12 years.

name: Plantation Gran Anejo Guatemala
description: One of the latest addition in the Plantation portfolio, the updated version is actually a blend of rums from neighbouring Guatemala and Belize. Guatemala at least produces their rums using fermented sugar cane honey (evaporated sugar cane juice) instead of the traditional molasses. Guatemala also uses a mix of bourbon and sherry cask for aging in their own solera system.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Plantation Guatemala Gran Anejo в коробці

name: Origenes Don Pancho Reserva 8-Year
description: A Cuban rum from the Maestro made in Panama

name: Rammstein Premium
description: The Rammstein Rum is a blend of three rums, which are from Jamaica, Trinidad, and Guyana. The blend was allowed to rest for 12 years and is bottled with 40% drinking strength without dyes. It’s a bit spicy and alcoholic in the nose, but with time, fruitier Jamaican notes come through. The palate is pleasant with slight sweetness, and the finish is slightly spicier with a little bitter note.

name: Wood's 100 Old Navy
description: Wood's 100 Old Navy is a dark rum with an ABV of 57%. It has a rich taste with aromas of molasses, brown sugar, and vanilla. This rum is known for its strength and complexity, offering notes of chocolate, caramel, and spices.

name: Ron de Jeremy XO 15-Year
description: Ron de Jeremy XO 15-Year is a sweet and pleasant rum that is easy to drink, with notes of vanilla and caramel. It has a slightly oily consistency due to its sugar content and leaves a warm, coffee-flavored aftertaste.

name: Plantation Pineapple Stiggin's Fancy
description: This is a rum that tasted more like rum than it does Pineapple when sipping neat and no other rum is around. Its got a nice flavor to it and the aroma at first is stronger to pineapple than the actual taste of the rum. Overall a nice sipper I would not really mix this at all personally. Very smooth rum with a very slight kick and moderate finish. Though if you drink a few pure rums first then have this, the pineapple really comes to life on the palate and its much more intense.

name: Paranubes Oaxaca Aguardiente de Caña
description: This a new agricole-style rum hailing from Oaxaca, bottled at 54% ABV. It opens with a hugely briny nose redolent of manzanilla olives. It's fairly grassy as well, so agricole lovers will not be disappointed. The palate is more muted—still briny, but well-balanced by a mild sweetness.

name: Malteco 15-Year
description: Ron de Guatemala Malteco 15 aňos reserva Maya, jak zní celý název tohoto rumu, je trochu záhadný a zjistit o něm víc informací je poměrně oříšek. Podle německých zdrojů za tímto rumem stojí firma Licorera Quetzalteca, která vstoupila do oboru lihovarnictví v roce 1939. Ačkoliv se stala brzy proslulou svými rumy, v současnosti je společnost považována za specialistu na zrající rumy. Obsah 0,7 litru. Měl by být vyráběn přímo ze šťávy cukrové třiny, a ne z melasy. Zraje samozřejmě v dubových sudech.

name: Captain Morgan 1671
description: A surprisingly good rum from the Captain. Normally I am not a fan of Captain Morgan, even private stock is not really enjoyable. However this rum really surprised me. Smooth and mixes quite well with coke. I will definitely be getting this again.

name: Pirate's Grog Golden
description: Pirate’s Grog rum is produced in Honduras on the island of Roatan by blending various rums from around the Caribbean that have been aged up to 5 years in American oak casks.

name: Pusser's Gunpowder Proof 3-Year
description: 54,5 abv navy style rum from Guyana or Barbados or a blend of Guyana, Barbados and Trinidad depending of which batch you happen to get. Mine happens to be just Guyanese rum. Nose: Strong raisins, salty caramel and vanilla. Taste: Very strong burnt salted caramel, raisins, butter, vanilla and slight oak in the end. It's a bit harsh without water added because of the high alcohol content, but I still liked it more neat than with water. Finish: Very long and light oak with the raisins and vanilla lingering a bit. Overall: Unique rum that has a bit different profile compared to most generic run of the mill rums. This rum is heavy bodied and very caramelly and strong. I strongly recommend for everyone, especially tiki cocktail lovers are going to have lots of fun with this rum.

name: Doorly's XO 6-Year
description: Produced in Barbados by master distiller Richard Seale, the rums in Doorly XO have been aged a minimum of 6 years before finishing in Olorosco sherry casks. The second maturation in sherry casks is rare and gives Doorly XO its unique flavour.

name: Eminente Reserva 7-Year
description: A blend of aged and young rums, matured in Cuba for 7 years in whisky casks.

name: Plantation Gran Anejo Guatemala & Belize
description: Matured in casks for 3 years in Guatemala, and finished in ex-cognac casks in France. Vanilla is very present with almond, marzipan and honey. Well balanced with cocoa, woody vanilla notes. Elegant finish.

name: Baron Samedi Spiced
description: Baron Samedi Spiced is a spiced rum known for its smooth taste with robust bouquet of spices. It is a good choice for mixing or enjoying straight.

name: Chairman’s Reserve The Forgotten Cask 6-11 Years
description: Aged rum from St. Lucia with a rich flavor profile, showcasing dried fruits, orange zest, and wood, offering a thin yet flavorful experience. It's nice for sipping and has a complex balance with hints of vanilla and tannins.

name: Plantation 3 Stars Artisanal
description: Plantation 3 Stars Artisanal is a blend of unaged rum from Barbados and Jamaica, three-year-old rum from Trinidad, and a twelve-year-old rum from Jamaica. It is cold-filtered to compete in the segment of white rums, leaving it smoother yet somewhat sweet. This rum is rated at 41.2% ABV (82.4 proof).

name: Clement 10-Year
description: Clément 10 year old Rhum Agricole has been distilled from fresh pressed sugarcane juice and aged a minimum of 10 years in a combination of virgin and re-charred oak barrels, yielding an exceptional aged Agricole Rhum with unique characteristics of cinnamon and vanilla. The nose reveals aromatic intensity of raw wood, dried spice and toasted fruit, leading to warm bakery flavors that carry through to an unimaginably lengthy finish.

name: A. H. Riise XO Reserve Christmas
description: A.H.Riise Christmas dozrával v sudech po sherry Pedro Ximenez. To mu přidalo na bohatosti a rum získal vánoční kořeněnou chuť po hřebíčku, skořici a pomeranči. Závěr je sametově jemný, lehce sladký. Výroba tohoto rumu je omezena, každý sud je vybrán osobně masterem destillerem. Každá láhev je opatřena číslem sudu a datem stáčení.

name: Malecon Reserva Superior 15-Year
description: Beautiful full coppery amber in glass. Fruity fresh on the nose, green fruits like the 12 years old and caramelised, toasted wood. Elegant and balanced on the palate, yet somehow wild and cheeky. Fruit, caramel, spices and subtle oak tones in perfect harmony. In the finish, a delicious cocoa note is joined to this quintet. A rum for Cuban style lovers.

name: Millonario Aniversario Reserva 10-Year
description: Millonario Aniversario Reserva 10-Year is a sweet rum with muscuvado sugar, cigar leafs, and oak notes. It offers sweetness with hints of brown sugar, tobacco, and a bit of spiciness.

name: Ron Zacapa Centenario 15
description: Ron Zacapa Centario 15 is blended in a solera system using rums aged between 6 and 23 years. It is distilled in Guatemala and distributed by Diageo.

name: Santiago de Cuba Extra Anejo 12-Year
description: This is a molasses based rum made from sugarcane grown in the southeast of Cuba and distilled on the legendary former Bacardi column stills at Santiago de Cuba. It is then aged 12 Years in White Oak barrels and bottled at 40%.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Santiago de Cuba Extra Anejo 12 років

name: Cockspur 12-Year
description: Cockspur 12-Year rum offers a tropical profile with notes of coconut, vanilla, caramel, and a hint of dark chocolate, tobacco, and spices. It’s best enjoyed neat or as a premium mixer.

name: Cihuatan Reserva Especial 8-Year
description: Cihuatan Reserva Especial 8-Year is a rum from El Salvador that is aged for 8 years. It has a 40% ABV and features a profile that includes notes of vanilla and caramel.

name: Pampero Aniversario Reserva Exclusiva
description: Pampero Aniversario was first crafted in 1963 to commemorate the Pampero company’s 25th anniversary. The rum is a blend of rums ranging in maturity from four to six years and aged in whisky and bourbon barrels.

name: Plantation Barbados 5-Year
description: Plantation Barbados 5-Year rum is distilled from molasses and aged 5 years in bourbon casks before being transported to France for further 'finishing' in Cognac casks.

name: Admiral Rodney HMS Princessa 5-Year
description: Rhum de mélasse de style anglais originaire de Sainte Lucie (Caraïbes), assemblage de rhums entre 5 & 7 ans d'âge. Bouteille : superbe, très élégante, le rhum a une belle couleur acajou foncé. Nez : il est (trop ?) prometteur (bonne odeur de vanille, caramel & fruits secs). Bouche : attaque doucereuse puis alcool et boisé. Ce rhum est assez doux mais il est évanescent. La finale est agréable avec un très léger goût de toffee. Au final ce rhum est trop faible en goût.

name: A. H. Riise Royal Danish Navy 40%
description: A. H. Riise Royal Danish Navy is a Gold rum from Denmark. It has a high sweetness profile which some compare to a liqueur rather than a traditional rum. Users have rated it variously, with many noting its sugary taste, including caramel and hints of orange, while others have criticized it for being excessively sweet.

name: Doctor Bird Pot Still
description: This is the first rum expression from Two James Spirits craft distillers. A blend of Worthy Park pot still rums, blended and aged in St. Catherine Jamaica, then shipped to Detroit to be finished in Moscatel Sherry casks. It has a big, funky nose with lots of fruit, some cherry and maple, entering sweetly on the tongue with a bit of a bite, and a moderately short finish.

name: Appleton Estate Extra 12-Year
description: Appleton Estate 12-Year Rum is a blend of several rums aged between 12 and 18 years in American oak barrels after being distilled using small-batch copper pot stills.

name: Compagnie des Indes Jamaica Navy Strength 5-Year
description: The Compagnie des Indes Jamaica Navy Strength is a single cask rum from the Worthy Park distillery and was allowed to store for five years in oak barrels. The special thing about this rum is that it is a blend of pot and column still. Therefore, light parts are also represented. The rum was bottled with 57% alcohol, which is why it is called Navy Rum. All, of course, without dyes or sugar.

name: Cartavio 12-Year
description: Smokey, sweet, and a little spicy yet smooth. This makes an exceptional rum and coke too.

name: Plantation 2009 Fiji
description: Tasty, but not quite great

name: Opthimus 15-Year
description: Aged 15 years in bourbon and whiskey casks, this rum has a beautiful flavor profile featuring vanilla, chocolate, and cocoa with a delicate honey finish.

name: Bacardi Gran Reserva Diez 10-Year
description: Tasty, but not quite great.

silpoMatch.silpo_title: Ром Bacardi Gran Reserva Diez 10 років

name: A. H. Riise XO Reserve Superior Cask
description: Tasty, but not quite great

name: Cihuatan Reserva Especial 12-Year
description: Tasty, but not quite great

name: Malecon Reserva Imperial 18-Year
description: Malecon Reserva Imperial 18-Year is a rum that has been aged for 18 years, providing a complex flavor profile that appeals to rum enthusiasts.

name: A. H. Riise Royal Danish Navy Frogman
description: Limited Edition with a Strong taste

name: Austrian Empire Solera 18-Year
description: Tasty, but not quite great
